title: Monsoon Flash Flood Warning - Sindh
description: Heavy monsoon rainfall expected across lower Sindh. Indus tributaries breaching warning levels. Immediate evacuation recommended in low-lying areas of Dadu and Jamshoro.

title: GLOF Risk Elevated - Gilgit Baltistan
description: Accelerated glacial melt detected in Shisper and Passu glaciers. Downstream communities on Hunza river advised to remain alert.

title: Heatwave Alert - Southern Punjab
description: Temperatures forecast to exceed 46C for the next 72 hours in Bahawalpur, Rahim Yar Khan and Multan districts.

title: Landslide Probability Increase - Ziarat Axis
description: Slope saturation and unstable terrain conditions reported after persistent rain spells in upland Balochistan.

title: Urban Stormwater Stress - Karachi
description: Localized urban flooding expected during evening convective cells. Municipal pumps and emergency response teams placed on standby.

title: Drought Advisory Trigger - Tharparkar
description: Water stress indicators remain above seasonal average. Livelihood support and tanker routing remain in force for vulnerable union councils.

title: M 6.8 Earthquake - Off East Coast of Honshu
description: Shallow earthquake offshore Japan. Tsunami advisories issued for northeastern coastline. JMA monitoring ongoing.

title: Tropical Cyclone - Bay of Bengal
description: Category 2 cyclone tracking northeast. Expected landfall within 36 hours. Evacuation underway in coastal districts.

title: Wildfire Outbreak - California
description: Fast moving wildfire burning across 12,000 acres. Red flag warning in effect across the region.

title: Volcanic Ash Advisory - North Pacific
description: Ash plume detected at flight levels over North Pacific corridor. Aviation reroutes initiated.

title: Regional Tsunami Watch - Southwest Pacific
description: Aftershock sequence maintaining elevated sea-level oscillation risk for exposed coastlines.

title: Heat Health Warning - Southern Europe
description: Persistent high night-time temperatures expected in urban cores. Public cooling shelters activated.
